nl_prompt: What is our total revenue for Electronics products?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(products.list_price * order_items.quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM products
JOIN order_items ON products.id = order_items.product_id
WHERE products.category = 'Electronics'

nl_prompt: What is the revenue for the top-selling product?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.line_total) AS total_revenue
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the revenue breakdown by product category?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category

nl_prompt: Which customers placed more than 5 orders?
generated_sql: SELECT customers.name FROM customers WHERE customers.id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5)

nl_prompt: Who are our top 10 customers by lifetime revenue?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category FROM products p
JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id
JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN r.refund_amount > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(o.id) > 10

nl_prompt: What is the revenue per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, SUM(o.line_value) AS revenue_per_segment
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: Which sales rep closed the most orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT sales_reps.rep_name, COUNT(orders.id) AS order_count
FROM orders
JOIN sales_reps ON orders.sales_rep_id = sales_reps.id
GROUP BY sales_reps.rep_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the average order value per customer segment?

SELECT c.segment, AVG(o.line_value) AS average_order_value

nl_prompt: What is the revenue from completed orders versus pending orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'Completed' THEN o.line_value ELSE 0 END) AS completed_revenue,
       SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'Pending' THEN o.line_value ELSE 0 END) AS pending_revenue
FROM orders o

nl_prompt: Which product has the highest total quantity sold?

nl_prompt: What is the total discount given across all orders?

JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category

nl_prompt: What is the delivery success rate for Enterprise segment customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN d.delivery_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(d.tracking_id) * 100 AS delivery_success_rate
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries d ON o.shipping_id = d.tracking_id
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'

nl_prompt: Total revenue from customers whose CRM deals closed successfully?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON o.shipping_id = so.opp_id
WHERE so.stage = 'Closed Won'

nl_prompt: Which customers have both high order value and a delayed shipment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.line_value > 1000 AND o.ship_date < o.order_date

nl_prompt: Which product categories have delivery complaints from high-value CRM accounts?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category FROM products p
JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id
JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
JOIN sf_accounts sa ON o.customer_id = sa.account_id
WHERE sa.annual_revenue > 100000
  AND r.reason = 'Delivery Complaint'

nl_prompt: Which logistics carrier has the worst on-time rate for top revenue customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT l.carrier_name, AVG(CASE WHEN ld.delivery_date >= ld.expected_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_rate
FROM logistics_deliveries ld
JOIN orders o ON ld.tracking_id = o.shipping_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise' OR c.segment = 'Mid-Market'
GROUP BY l.carrier_name
ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC
LIMIT 1
error_message:

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, SUM(od.line_total) AS total_revenue, COUNT(r.id) AS complaint_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items od ON o.id = od.order_id
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
WHERE r.reason IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which product categories have the most negative sentiment?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, COUNT(*) AS negative_sentiment_count
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
WHERE r.refund_amount > 0
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY negative_sentiment_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What common complaints appear for delayed shipments?
generated_sql: SELECT reason FROM returns WHERE order_id IN (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE status = 'Delayed')

nl_prompt: Find customers who mentioned competitors in support.
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%competitors%'

nl_prompt: What were top 3 reasons for returns?
generated_sql: SELECT reason, COUNT(*) AS return_count FROM returns GROUP BY reason ORDER BY return_count DESC LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?
generated_sql:
SELECT sales_reps.rep_name FROM sales_reps
JOIN orders ON sales_reps.id = orders.sales_rep_id
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id
WHERE orders.status = 'Completed'
GROUP BY sales_reps.rep_name
ORDER BY SUM(orders.line_value) DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.segment AS segment,
    COUNT(c.id) AS customer_count,
    SUM(o.line_value) AS total_order_value,
    AVG(o.discount_pct) AS average_discount_pct,
    AVG(o.quantity) AS average_quantity,
    AVG(o.shipping_id) AS average_shipping_id,
    AVG(o.status) AS average_status
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE 
    c.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY 
    c.segment

nl_prompt: Which logistics partners have most damaged goods complaints?
generated_sql:
SELECT carrier_name, COUNT(*) AS complaint_count
FROM logistics_deliveries
WHERE status_code = 100
GROUP BY carrier_name
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What do churned customers say were top reasons for leaving?
generated_sql: SELECT r.reason FROM returns r INNER JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled'

nl_prompt: Find orders where complaints mention product defects.
generated_sql: SELECT o.id FROM orders o JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id WHERE r.reason LIKE '%product defects%'
